title: CRE Simulation
description: Deterministic CRE simulation checks for trading workflow.

tests.title: trading workflow simulation succeeds with deterministic trading fixture.
tests.description: This test validates workflow runtime behavior using deterministic fixture inputs. It catches CRE dependency and runtime regressions in the trading workflow.
steps: Run cre workflow simulate trading with docs/fixtures/workflows/trading.json payload
tests.successCriteria: Simulation exits successfully and output evidence is persisted.

tests.title: Trading workflow simulation remains deterministic across repeated runs with identical fixture input.
tests.description: This deep simulation test verifies output stability by executing the workflow twice with the same payload. It catches hidden nondeterminism and unstable workflow behavior.
steps: Run cre workflow simulate trading with deterministic fixture
Run the same command again with identical fixture
Compare output markers and assert deterministic behavior
tests.successCriteria: Both simulations succeed and produce deterministic output structure for key markers.
